info.title: dotnet-d1
info.description: Command-line tool for managing Cloudflare D1 database migrations. Provides commands for creating, applying, and rolling back migrations for CloudflareD1.NET applications.

commands.name: list
commands.description: List all migrations and their status

commands.name: scaffold
commands.description: Generate a migration from database schema changes

commands.name: diff
commands.description: Generate a migration by diffing Code-First model against last snapshot

commands.name: rollback
commands.description: Rollback the last migration or to a specific migration
